_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Failed conservative management for thoracic outlet syndrome.
Presence of arterial thoracic outlet syndrome, for which initial surgical intervention is often indicated.
Presence of venous thoracic outlet syndrome, for which initial surgical intervention is often indicated.

ppd_preauth.q: Are clinical notes with detailed history, signs & symptoms, and indication for procedure submitted?
Was the Doppler/Angio/ CT Angio/ MRI report suggestive of thoracic outlet syndrome?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Procedure / Operative notes submitted?
Is there a Detailed Discharge Summary mentioning date of follow-up submitted?
Is the barcode of graft used submitted?

common_queries: Angio/ CT Angio/ MRI report not suggestive of thoracic outlet syndrome, or report missing.
Clinical notes with detailed history, signs & symptoms, and indication for procedure are missing or insufficient.
Detailed Procedure / Operative notes are missing.
Detailed Discharge Summary is missing or does not mention date of follow-up.
Barcode of graft used is missing.

clinical_key_pointers: Thoracic outlet syndrome (TOS) is a nonspecific diagnosis representing many conditions that involve the compression of the neurovascular structures that pass through the thoracic outlet.
